description: Forecast is calibrated contextualized and uncertainty-aware
review_question: Can decision-makers understand what the prediction does and does not support?

description: Score-to-action boundary is justified and documented
review_question: Who chose the threshold and what consequences follow?
Does the expected value hide distributional harm or uncertainty?
Are false positives and false negatives treated appropriately?

description: Decision includes effectiveness equity cost feasibility reversibility and legitimacy
Reviewers can understand challenge override and document decisions
Affected people can understand challenge and correct outcomes
System can be paused rolled back or retired
review_question: Who can stop unsafe decision support?
